notes:
Fixed: the bot list pop-out would not open (error 0x8007139F) after the 1.33.1 background fix.
Scout alerts no longer fire when YOU scout someone - only a scout landing on one of your own cities raises an alert.
New: post "fleet me" in alliance chat and a chosen account applies 2 Fleet Feet automatically. Set it up under Settings, then Configuration, then Fleet Feet.
Script version tags now read the version straight from the script file, so Radius Scout and Map Scanner show the right number.
